title: deutzia calycosa
intro: Deutzia calycosa, also known as the Chinese beautybush or beautybush, is a flowering plant native to Asia that belongs to the hydrangea family (Hydrangeaceae). Traditionally, Deutzia calycosa has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help to manage blood pressure due to its vasodilatory effects. Deutzia calycosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
